payload.title: [MEDIUM] OAuth state not browser-bound; no PKCE on the GitHub path
payload.description: state is stored in a fixed-name cookie and only compared to itself; not bound to the eventual session, enabling login-CSRF/session-fixation (sign the victim into the attacker's account). GitHub adapter has no PKCE. FIX: bind a per-flow id (HMAC in state), add PKCE to GitHub, verify OIDC nonce.
